creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2010-05-02 12:08:37 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/mawstats         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/mawstats/files   pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  MAWStats is a free site statistics and analytics package.
  It runs in conjunction with AWStats and produces clear and informative charts,
  graphs and tables about your website visitors.
  
  WWW: http://mawstats.lingnu.com/
  
  PR:             ports/146080
  Submitted by:   Frank Wall <fw at moov.de>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2616    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/www/mawstats/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/mawstats/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/www/mawstats/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/mawstats/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +758 -0    ports/www/mawstats/pkg-plist (new)
